title: 100L Laundry Basket with Lid, 2 Compartments for Sorting Laundry, Hamper Laundry Bin with Care Guide & 2 Removable Inner Bags, Dirty Clothes Basket with Bamboo-Rim Oxford Fabric (Black 100L)
features: 𝐋𝐚𝐫𝐠𝐞 𝟏𝟎𝟎𝐋 𝐂𝐚𝐩𝐚𝐜𝐢𝐭𝐲: Thryzzle laundry basket is spacious enough to hold a week's worth of laundry for the whole family, helping keep your space neat and organized.
𝐃𝐮𝐚𝐥 𝐂𝐨𝐦𝐩𝐚𝐫𝐭𝐦𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐬 & 𝐑𝐞𝐦𝐨𝐯𝐚𝐛𝐥𝐞 𝐁𝐚𝐠𝐬: This laundry basket with lid comes with 2 inner bags for easy sorting of light and dark clothes, and effortless transfer to the washing machine.
𝐃𝐮𝐫𝐚𝐛𝐥𝐞 𝐁𝐚𝐦𝐛𝐨𝐨 & 𝐎𝐱𝐟𝐨𝐫𝐝 𝐌𝐚𝐭𝐞𝐫𝐢𝐚𝐥: Made from strong Oxford fabric with a sturdy natural bamboo frame, this laundry bin offers both durability and eco-friendly appeal.
𝐒𝐥𝐢𝐦 𝐒𝐩𝐚𝐜𝐞-𝐒𝐚𝐯𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐃𝐞𝐬𝐢𝐠𝐧: Compact laundry hamper sizes (33L x 44W x 69H cm) fit perfectly in bedroom corners, bathrooms, dorms, or laundry rooms.
𝐂𝐨𝐥𝐥𝐚𝐩𝐬𝐢𝐛𝐥𝐞 & 𝐋𝐢𝐠𝐡𝐭𝐰𝐞𝐢𝐠𝐡𝐭: Weighing only 1.1kg, this slim laundry bin for dirty clothes folds flat when not in use for convenient storage and portability.
𝐋𝐚𝐮𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐲 𝐆𝐮𝐢𝐝𝐞 𝐋𝐢𝐝: Features a printed laundry care guide on the lid, making it easy to understand washing symbols and garment care.
𝐌𝐮𝐥𝐭𝐢-𝐏𝐮𝐫𝐩𝐨𝐬𝐞 𝐔𝐬𝐞: Ideal for laundry, towel storage, toys, or home organization—perfect for modern homes and college dorms alike.
